sidebar.supporterMessage: Please consider becoming a <emphasis>Supporter</emphasis> to keep the project alive!

sponsorDialog.title: Help keep Complexity awesome!
sponsorDialog.description: We've poured countless hours into making Complexity a powerful and polished tool for you. Your support directly fuels ongoing development, new features, and keeping everything running smoothly.
sponsorDialog.descriptionLine2: If Complexity adds value to your workflow, please consider contributing to its future!

releaseNotes.title: Updated to v{{version}}
releaseNotes.dontShowAgain: Dismiss and don't show again for future updates

confirmDialog.title: Confirm
confirmDialog.message: Are you sure you want to dismiss and not show again for future updates? You can always re-enable this popup in the settings page.
